task-1782983323238-ikbdgn.description: Review dag.py against spec: TaskNode dataclass (id, description, dependencies, status), DAGBuilder class (text/JSON goal), build() returns dict of TaskNode with edges, detect_cycles() raises on circular deps

result.finding: build() is no-op accessor, detect_cycles not wired into build_from_goal

task-1782983324521-9c50ks.description: Review scheduler.py against spec: takes DAG from dag.py, topological_sort() via Kahn's algorithm, get_ready_tasks() returns tasks whose deps are all status=done, re_score() updates ready set after each wave

result.finding: duplicate-dependency correctness bug in topological_sort in-degree decrement

task-1782983326057-g5l6gq.description: Review executor.py against spec: takes one TaskNode, builds prompt from description+boundaries, calls claude CLI headlessly (claude -p "..." --output-format json), returns {task_id, result, session_id, cost_usd, success}

result.finding: wrong JSON key cost_usd vs total_cost_usd, ignores is_error, boundaries not implemented

task-1782983327437-mj0rlt.description: Review verifier.py against spec: takes working dir + list of commands, runs each via subprocess independently, returns {passed, output, failed_command}, must never trust agent self-report only shell exit codes

result.finding: TimeoutExpired not caught, crashes instead of returning failed result

task-1782983328969-tvnbpk.description: Review state.py against spec: SQLite tasks table (id, status, result, cost, verified, timestamp), write_task_result(task_id, executor_result, verifier_result), get_wave_summary() returns compact dict for checkpoint

result.finding: get_wave_summary aggregates across all waves ever, not scoped to current wave

task-1782983330339-vm07yz.description: Review checkpoint.py against spec: reads wave summary from state.py, prints tasks completed/tests passed-failed/total cost, prompts human [A]pprove/[R]edirect/[E]dit plan, returns human decision as string

result.finding: acceptable design, no critical bugs, checkpoint decoupled from state.py by design

task-1782983331842-zg9hwo.description: Review main.py against spec: accepts goal as CLI arg, builds DAG, gets ready queue, executes wave, verifies, writes state, shows checkpoint after each wave, loops until DAG complete or human stops, prints final summary (total tasks, cost, time). Also verify: verifier.py must never be skippable — task not marked done if verification fails

result.critical: verification completely bypassed in _verify_task, hardcoded passed:True
